{{CargoClone
|name=Goblin King
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=179
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} FAME +50
|gene3=Refine +1 Green Demon God Material +1.5%
|gene4=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Demon Minion Cloning SPD +1.2%
|gene6=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Demon Minion Cloning SPD +2%
|}}
